candidates.name: Skill Install + Version Stamping

candidates.name: Autonomy Rules Section in SKILL.md
candidates.description: 22 auto-run + 7 ask-first with per-command reasons. Retrofit candidate for add-debt, pr-review, session-end, audit-* skills.

candidates.name: Nightly RPC Health Check
candidates.description: rpc-health.yml: daily cron, 3 exit codes, auto-creates labeled GitHub issues. External contract monitoring pattern.

candidates.description: 4-step embedded PR workflow. Alternative to /pr-review. Ambient vs invoked design question.

candidates.description: Literal Task() invocations in SKILL.md workflows. Reduces agent cognitive load.
